title: Eric Cagle
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Eric Cagle''' is a freelance game designer and writer who has done work for [[Wizards of the Coast]] on the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''. His contributions include co-writing several books, adventures, and scenarios for both the d20 [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] and the [[Star Wars Saga Edition]] Roleplaying Game.

{{Author-stub}}

==Works==
===Books===
*''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' - April 2003
*''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]'' - June 2004
*''[[Threats of the Galaxy]]'' - May 2008
*''[[Galaxy at War]]'' - September 2009
*''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]'' - December 2010
*[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]] - July 2013
